title: Audit bivariate cumulant map
summary: Completed the M06 adversarial audit of the bivariate cumulant map, confirming the coefficient/index pattern and correcting clean-equation versus identifying-restriction language.

user_inputs.text: Continue with M06: adversarially audit the bivariate cumulant derivation before using it, checking indices, cumulant definitions, normalization, missing pure or mixed moments, and whether any moment is incorrectly called clean.

agent_actions.description: Independently enumerated all second-, third-, and fourth-order bivariate cumulant coefficients for B(a,b).
Recorded the M06 audit in review-log.md and in the derivation note, including the correction that clean third mixed cumulants are not identifying restrictions after unrestricted gamma profiling.
Updated the formal-object registry, dashboard, task board, workplan, session log, Codex log, and matching GitHub milestone.

checks.description: python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with only the expected open-milestone warning before M0008 closure
python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed after M0008 closure
